name: Configure Color Swatches in Shopify Editor
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure color swatches directly within the Shopify editor without needing to edit code, making it easy to customize how color options display on your product cards. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This simplified configuration approach enables merchants to adjust swatch visibility, style, and behavior settings through a visual interface, streamlining the setup process."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up color swatches through the Shopify editor provides flexible control over the customer experience, allowing you to choose between different display styles like sliders or \"+x more\" formats for both mobile and desktop. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By enabling the appropriate fields in your Merchant Dashboard and then configuring display preferences in the Shopify editor, you can create an intuitive color selection experience that helps improve product discovery and customer engagement."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color swatches improve your Shopify store by giving customers a visually intuitive way to browse and select products based on color. This guide walks you through configuring Merchandising Cloud-powered color swatches directly within the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Shopify editor", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Configure Swatches in the Shopify Editor"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After enabling the necessary fields in the Merchant Dashboard, follow these steps to set up and customize color swatches in the Shopify editor:"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "1. Access the Swatches Settings"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shopify Theme Editor", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "."}, {"text": "Example Screenshot:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This is usually found in\u00a0"}, {"text": "GB Operations Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0or a similar section of the theme customization panel.\n"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KRDX8M4ZOMP4/1660b12071335005d22964b5f424237ce755c78b76ec3401bbfc0233dbdbedf3-image-28.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KRDX8M4ZOMP4/1660b12071335005d22964b5f424237ce755c78b76ec3401bbfc0233dbdbedf3-image-28.png", "name": "1660b12071335005d22964b5f424237ce755c78b76ec3401bbfc0233dbdbedf3-image_28.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 184668, "width": 786, "height": 1680, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FKRDX8M4ZOMP4%2F1660b12071335005d22964b5f424237ce755c78b76ec3401bbfc0233dbdbedf3-image-28.png", "mediaID": 1064, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T21:23:12+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "2. Add and Customize Color Options"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Within the swatches settings, you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Show/Hide Color Swatches:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Enable or disable the display of swatches on your storefront."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Adjust Visibility Settings for Desktop:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Choose whether swatches are always visible or only visible on hover."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Customize Swatch Style:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Select the style for displaying swatches, such as a slider or a \"+x more\" format, for both mobile and desktop."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Preview Swatches:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Use the editor to view how the swatches will look on your store."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "3. Save and Publish"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After customizing your swatches, click\u00a0"}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to apply changes. Preview your store to confirm that the swatches appear correctly."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Tips for Better Swatch Management"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Use Accurate Color Codes:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Ensure color swatches accurately reflect the product variations to improve customer satisfaction."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Test Responsiveness:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Preview the store on different devices to confirm the swatches display properly across screen sizes."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Regular Updates:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0As you add new products or colors, revisit the Shopify editor to update the swatches configuration."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By configuring color swatches in the Shopify editor, you can provide a polished, customer-friendly experience that enhances product discovery and boosts engagement."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further support, reach out to\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
